title: Training Composer 2
summary: Cursor's research team built Composer 2, a coding-focused model starting from Kimi K2.5 (1T params, 32B active, 256K context). The model uses continued pre-training for domain knowledge, long-horizon reinforcement learning with auto-install capabilities, reward shaping with nonlinear length penalties, and self-summarization to extend context. Evaluation relies on Cursor Bench, an internal benchmark of real engineer queries.
